height="30" width="490" x="255" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4FLbCQbJ9mLm4d0UpexO-52" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=16;" value="Purpose: we want the different counter shards to be in different jcache lines. But adding padding to each counter wastes space. We can allocate two Sdarc's counter of same shard together to save space." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="440" x="255" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4FLbCQbJ9mLm4d0UpexO-53" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="Each ShardOfShardAlloc has its own RwLock. That sharding reduces lock contention when allocating." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="260" y="1210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
